offline.title: No internet connection
offline.subtitle: Check your connection and try again.

limit.title: You're running low on AI Credits
limit.body: You have {{balance}} of {{allocation}} AI Credits left this period. Go Premium to get 800 AI Credits per period.

camera_permission_message: Camera access is needed to take meal photos, scan barcodes, and set your profile photo.
default_error: Something went wrong. Please try again.

camera_loader_subtext: This may take a few seconds.
barcode_hint: Place the code within the frame

toast.savedLocallySyncLater: No internet. Saved locally, will sync when online.

unsaved_changes_message: You have unsaved changes. If you leave now, they won't be saved.
barcode_loader_subtext: Fetching product data from the database.
sync_conflict_resolved: A meal was updated on another device. We kept the most recent version.

billingErrors.billingUnavailable: Billing is unavailable on this device.
billingErrors.billingNotReady: Billing is not ready yet. Please try again in a moment.
billingErrors.signInRequired: Please sign in to manage subscriptions.
billingErrors.loginFailed: Unable to connect your account to billing. Please try again.
billingErrors.productsUnavailable: Subscription options are temporarily unavailable. Please try again later.
billingErrors.entitlementPending: Purchase completed, but activation is still pending. Please restore purchases in a moment.
billingErrors.network: Network problem while contacting the App Store. Please try again.
billingErrors.purchaseNotAllowed: Purchases are not allowed on this device.
billingErrors.storeProblem: The App Store is temporarily unavailable. Please try again later.
